query: As of July 13 2026, what is the current status of the Eastern Pacific hurricane season? Are there any active tropical storms or disturbances being monitored by NHC that could become named storm Elida (5th storm) or later? List all named EPAC storms of 2026 so far with formation dates, and any current NHC tropical weather outlook areas of interest east of 140W.
answer:
Research complete. Here's a summary of my findings on the 2026 Eastern Pacific hurricane season as of July 13, 2026:

## Key finding — an important premise correction

The question assumes Elida is the 5th storm following **Dalila**, but that reflects the **2025** name list. In **2026**, the EPAC names run: Amanda, Boris, Cristina, **Douglas**, **Elida**, Fausto... So the 4th storm was **Douglas**, and **Elida is indeed the next (5th) name** — but it follows Douglas, not Dalila. ("Dalila" was the 4th storm of the 2025 season, June 2025.)

## Named EPAC storms of 2026 so far (4 total, 0 hurricanes)
1. **Amanda** — June 2, 2026
2. **Boris** — June 7, 2026 (impacts to southern Mexico)
3. **Cristina** — June 8, 2026 (flooding/fatalities in Guatemala–Chiapas)
4. **Douglas** — July 1, 2026 (open water, weakened to remnant low by ~July 3–5)

**No named storm is currently active** — Douglas has dissipated.

## Current NHC outlook (5 AM PDT, July 13) — next storm would be Elida
NHC is monitoring 5 areas. Those east of 140°W:
- **Offshore SW Mexico** — tropical wave, **48h: 60% / 7-day: 90%**; TD expected in 2–3 days → **leading candidate to become Elida**
- **Well WSW of Baja California** — 10% / 10% (unlikely)
- **New low forming mid-week off southern Mexico** — ~0% / 60%

Two additional areas near/south of Hawaii (near/west of 140°W) were also flagged at lower odds.

**Caveat:** One secondary outlet (TechTimes) called the next storm "Emilia," which contradicts the authoritative NHC name list (Elida). I've flagged this in the structured output.

Note: Per my role, I report the NHC's own operational formation probabilities as facts — I don't forecast whether Elida will actually form.
